heading: Exemption from State regulation of securities offerings

Clarification of the Preservation of State Enforcement Authority, , , provided that: The amendments made by subsection (a) [amending this section] relate solely to State registration, documentation, and offering requirements, as described under section 18(a) of [the] Securities Act of 1933 (), and shall have no impact or limitation on other State authority to take enforcement action with regard to an issuer, funding portal, or any other person or entity using the exemption from registration provided by section 4(6) [probably means “section 4(a)(6)”] of that Act [].”Pub. L. 112–106, title III, § 305(b)(1)126 Stat. 32215 U.S.C. 77r(a)15 U.S.C. 77d(a)(6)Apr. 5, 2012

Study and Report on Uniformity of State Regulatory Requirements, , , provided that:Pub. L. 104–290, title I, § 102(b)110 Stat. 3420Oct. 11, 1996“The Commission shall conduct a study, after consultation with States, issuers, brokers, and dealers, on the extent to which uniformity of State regulatory requirements for securities or securities transactions has been achieved for securities that are not covered securities (within the meaning of section 18 of the Securities Act of 1933 [], as amended by paragraph (1) of this subsection). Not later than 1 year after the date of enactment of this Act [], the Commission shall submit a report to the Congress on the results of such study.”15 U.S.C. 77rOct. 11, 1996

children.text: is a covered security; or

children.label: B
children.text: will be a covered security upon completion of the transaction;

children.label: A
children.text: with respect to a covered security described in subsection (b), any offering document that is prepared by or on behalf of the issuer; or

children.label: B
children.text: any proxy statement, report to shareholders, or other disclosure document relating to a covered security or the issuer thereof that is required to be and is filed with the Commission or any national securities organization registered under section 78–3 of this title, except that this subparagraph does not apply to the laws, rules, regulations, or orders, or other administrative actions of the State of incorporation of the issuer; oro
shall directly or indirectly prohibit, limit, or impose conditions, based on the merits of such offering or issuer, upon the offer or sale of any security described in paragraph (1).

children.heading: Exclusive Federal registration of nationally traded securities
children.label: 1 Exclusive Federal registration of nationally traded securities
A
children.text: a security designated as qualified for trading in the national market system pursuant to that is listed, or authorized for listing, on a national securities exchange (or tier or segment thereof); orsection 78k–1(a)(2) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: a security of the same issuer that is equal in seniority or that is a senior security to a security described in subparagraph (A).

children.heading: Exclusive Federal registration of investment companies
children.label: 2 Exclusive Federal registration of investment companies
children.text: A security is a covered security if such security is a security issued by an investment company that is registered, or that has filed a registration statement, under the Investment Company Act of 1940 [ et seq.].15 U.S.C. 80a–1

children.heading: Sales to qualified purchasers
children.label: 3 Sales to qualified purchasers
children.text: A security is a covered security with respect to the offer or sale of the security to qualified purchasers, as defined by the Commission by rule. In prescribing such rule, the Commission may define the term “qualified purchaser” differently with respect to different categories of securities, consistent with the public interest and the protection of investors.

children.heading: Exemption in connection with certain exempt offerings
children.label: 4 Exemption in connection with certain exempt offerings
A
children.text: paragraph (1) or (3) of section 77d of this title, and the issuer of such security files reports with the Commission pursuant to section 78m or 78(d) of this title;1See References in Text note below.1o

children.label: B
children.text: section 77d(4) of this title;1

children.label: C
children.text: section 77d(6) of this title;1

children.label: i
children.text: offered or sold on a national securities exchange; or

children.label: ii
children.text: offered or sold to a qualified purchaser, as defined by the Commission pursuant to paragraph (3) with respect to that purchase or sale;

children.label: E
children.text: , other than the offer or sale of a security that is exempt from such registration pursuant to paragraph (4), (10), or (11) of such section, except that a municipal security that is exempt from such registration pursuant to paragraph (2) of such section is not a covered security with respect to the offer or sale of such security in the State in which the issuer of such security is located;section 77c(a) of this title

children.label: F
children.text: Commission rules or regulations issued under section 77d(2) of this title, except that this subparagraph does not prohibit a State from imposing notice filing requirements that are substantially similar to those required by rule or regulation under section 77d(2) of this title that are in effect on ; or11September 1, 1996

children.label: G
children.text: .section 77d(a)(7) of this title

children.label: i
children.text: fraud or deceit; or

children.label: ii
children.text: unlawful conduct by a broker, dealer, or funding portal; and

children.label: i
children.text: fraud or deceit; or

children.label: ii
children.text: unlawful conduct by a broker, dealer, funding portal, or issuer.

children.heading: Notice filings permitted
children.label: A Notice filings permitted
children.text: Nothing in this section prohibits the securities commission (or any agency or office performing like functions) of any State from requiring the filing of any document filed with the Commission pursuant to this subchapter, together with annual or periodic reports of the value of securities sold or offered to be sold to persons located in the State (if such sales data is not included in documents filed with the Commission), solely for notice purposes and the assessment of any fee, together with a consent to service of process and any required fee.

children.heading: In general
children.label: i In general
children.text: Until otherwise provided by law, rule, regulation, or order, or other administrative action of any State or any political subdivision thereof, adopted after , filing or registration fees with respect to securities or securities transactions shall continue to be collected in amounts determined pursuant to State law as in effect on the day before .October 11, 1996October 11, 1996

children.heading: Schedule
children.label: ii Schedule
children.text: The fees required by this subparagraph shall be paid, and all necessary supporting data on sales or offers for sales required under subparagraph (A), shall be reported on the same schedule as would have been applicable had the issuer not relied on the exemption provided in subsection (a).

children.heading: Availability of preemption contingent on payment of fees
children.label: C Availability of preemption contingent on payment of fees

children.heading: In general
children.label: i In general
children.text: During the period beginning on , and ending 3 years after , the securities commission (or any agency or office performing like functions) of any State may require the registration of securities issued by any issuer who refuses to pay the fees required by subparagraph (B).October 11, 1996October 11, 1996

children.heading: Delays
children.label: ii Delays
children.text: For purposes of this subparagraph, delays in payment of fees or underpayments of fees that are promptly remedied shall not constitute a refusal to pay fees.

children.heading: Fees not permitted on listed securities
children.label: D Fees not permitted on listed securities
children.text: Notwithstanding subparagraphs (A), (B), and (C), no filing or fee may be required with respect to any security that is a covered security pursuant to subsection (b)(1), or will be such a covered security upon completion of the transaction, or is a security of the same issuer that is equal in seniority or that is a senior security to a security that is a covered security pursuant to subsection (b)(1).

children.heading: Fees not permitted on crowdfunded securities4So in original. No subpar. (E) has been enacted.4
children.label: F Fees not permitted on crowdfunded securities4So in original. No subpar. (E) has been enacted.4
children.text: Notwithstanding subparagraphs (A), (B), and (C), no filing or fee may be required with respect to any security that is a covered security pursuant to subsection (b)(4)(B), or will be such a covered security upon completion of the transaction, except for the securities commission (or any agency or office performing like functions) of the State of the principal place of business of the issuer, or any State in which purchasers of 50 percent or greater of the aggregate amount of the issue are residents, provided that for purposes of this subparagraph, the term “State” includes the District of Columbia and the territories of the United States.

children.heading: Enforcement of requirements
children.label: 3 Enforcement of requirements
children.text: Nothing in this section shall prohibit the securities commission (or any agency or office performing like functions) of any State from suspending the offer or sale of securities within such State as a result of the failure to submit any filing or fee required under law and permitted under this section.

children.label: A
children.text: has the meaning given the term “prospectus” in , but without regard to the provisions of subparagraphs (a) and (b) of that section; andsection 77b(a)(10) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: includes a communication that is not deemed to offer a security pursuant to a rule of the Commission.

children.heading: Prepared by or on behalf of the issuer
children.label: 2 Prepared by or on behalf of the issuer
children.text: Not later than 6 months after , the Commission shall, by rule, define the term “prepared by or on behalf of the issuer” for purposes of this section.October 11, 1996

children.heading: State
children.label: 3 State
children.text: The term “State” has the same meaning as in .section 78c of this title

children.heading: Senior security
children.label: 4 Senior security
children.text: The term “senior security” means any bond, debenture, note, or similar obligation or instrument constituting a security and evidencing indebtedness, and any stock of a class having priority over any other class as to distribution of assets or payment of dividends.
